meta.title: CartWise – Free Grocery List App with Live Price Calculator (No Sign-Up)
meta.description: Add items by voice or AI, watch your cart total update as you shop, and share lists instantly via QR or WhatsApp. Free, offline, no account needed. Android.

hero.headline: The free grocery list app that adds up your total as you shop
hero.tagline: Grocery list with a real-time price calculator, voice input, and instant sharing. No fuss, no signup.

features.headline: Everything your grocery trip needs, and a running total
features.subline: Built for real shopping, not demos.

priceCalc.title: Real-time Price Calculator
priceCalc.desc: See the running total update as you tick items. Know your budget before you reach the checkout.

voice.title: Voice-to-Text Input
voice.desc: Say "2 liters of milk" and it lands on your list. Hands full? Voice works.

ai.title: AI-Generated Lists
ai.desc: Tell CartWise what you're cooking and it builds the ingredient list for you.

sharing.title: Instant Sharing
sharing.desc: Share via QR code or WhatsApp link. Everyone sees updates in real time, no account needed.

analytics.title: Budget Tracker & Analytics
analytics.desc: Spending reports by category let you spot where the budget is going each week.

categories.title: Smart Auto-Categorization
categories.desc: Items are grouped by aisle automatically, so you move through the store in order.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.desc: Set a reminder to leave the house at the right time. CartWise pings you, not the other way around.

offline.title: Offline-First
offline.desc: All your lists are stored locally. No signal in the store? CartWise still works perfectly.

languages.title: Available in 8 Languages
languages.desc: English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Italian, Dutch, and Polish.

plans.headline: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
plans.subline: CartWise is free to use. Pro is an optional upgrade for power users.

free.label: Free
free.feature3: Shared lists with real-time sync (QR + WhatsApp)

pro.label: Pro
pro.ctaNote: Upgrade to Pro available inside the app

faq.headline: Common questions
faq.q1: Do I need an account to use CartWise?
faq.a1: No. CartWise works entirely without an account. Open the app and start shopping. Sharing a list doesn't require the other person to sign up either.
faq.a2: Yes — CartWise is free to download and use, with no account. The free tier includes unlimited lists, the price calculator, budget tracking, and shared lists with real-time sync. Voice input (10/day) and reminders (1 per list) are included too. Pro is an optional in-app upgrade that removes ads, lifts those caps, and adds premium themes and priority support.
faq.a3: Tap the share button on any list to generate a QR code or a WhatsApp link. Anyone who scans or taps the link joins the list instantly. Changes made by any member appear in real time for everyone.
faq.q4: Does voice input record or store my audio?
faq.a4: No. Speech is converted to text on your device using Android's built-in speech recognition. No audio is sent to FusionCore's servers or stored anywhere.
faq.q5: What platforms is CartWise available on?
faq.a5: CartWise is currently available on Android via Google Play. iOS support is on our roadmap.
